patternCandidates.name: MCP auto-discovery from CLI metadata
patternCandidates.description: Zero-schema MCP server that introspects Click CLI commands and auto-generates MCP tool definitions. ~200 lines. Uses CliRunner for execution. Eliminates manual schema duplication.
patternCandidates.notes: Not directly portable (Python/Click vs Node/TypeScript) but the PRINCIPLE is portable. Derive MCP tools from existing CLI/API metadata instead of hand-writing schemas. Directly relevant to JASON-OS Domain 02a.

patternCandidates.name: Hook execution model with ordering and bg/fg lifecycle
patternCandidates.description: Production-grade hook system: event-family naming convention (on_{EventFamily}__{order}_{name}[.bg].{ext}), 2-digit ordering prefix for execution sequence, foreground/background distinction, SIGTERM finalization for background hooks, JSONL stdout contract.
patternCandidates.notes: SoNash has better hook governance (analytics, warnings, audits) but ArchiveBox has better hook runtime semantics (ordering, bg/fg, SIGTERM). Complementary patterns. Relevant to hook-ecosystem-audit and T31.

patternCandidates.name: CLAUDE.md as structured developer philosophy document
patternCandidates.description: 498-line CLAUDE.md encoding not just setup instructions but development philosophy: grep-friendly naming (consistent prefixes), minimize-unique-names principle, NO MOCKS testing standard, coverage-as-dead-code methodology. Goes beyond reference docs into opinionated guidance.
patternCandidates.notes: SoNash CLAUDE.md is 135 lines focused on rules/constraints. ArchiveBox CLAUDE.md is 498 lines including philosophy and methodology. Consider expanding SoNash CLAUDE.md or creating companion PHILOSOPHY.md.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Coverage-as-dead-code-detector methodology
knowledgeCandidates.description: Using pytest-cov JSON output + jq pipelines to find 0% coverage files as dead code candidates. Passive coverage collection during dev server usage for broader signal.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Claude Code in CI (claude.yml workflow)
knowledgeCandidates.description: Claude Code running as GitHub Actions workflow in CI pipeline. Pattern for AI-assisted development automation.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Strict assertion testing convention
knowledgeCandidates.description: Use exact counts (==) not loose bounds (>=) in test assertions. Forces tests to catch regressions rather than just pass.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Plugin isolation principle
knowledgeCandidates.description: Plugins forbidden from importing host application or framework (Django). Only 2 shared files allowed. Enforces true independence.

antiPatternCandidates.name: SOLO_MAINTAINER_GOVERNANCE
antiPatternCandidates.description: 27K stars but 0/29 changesets with code review. Architectural decisions in prose docs (old/), not enforced contracts. 100% community health score masks governance gap.
antiPatternCandidates.source: OpenSSF scorecard + GitHub branch protection analysis

antiPatternCandidates.name: PERMISSIVE_DEFAULTS_FOR_SELF_HOSTED
antiPatternCandidates.description: ALLOWED_HOSTS='*', SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE=False, no HTTPS enforcement. Security-by-configuration rather than security-by-default.

antiPatternCandidates.name: CONFIGURED_NOT_ENFORCED_TYPING
antiPatternCandidates.description: Pyright configured in pyproject.toml but 48% type coverage with heavy Any usage. Type checker as CI decoration rather than enforcement gate.

cross_repo_connections.detail: ArchiveBox is a self-hosted archiver; crawl4ai is a crawling framework. Both handle web content extraction but at different layers. ArchiveBox's hook-based extractor system could consume crawl4ai output.
firecrawl converts URLs to LLM-ready markdown; ArchiveBox preserves full-fidelity archives (PDF, WARC, DOM). Different goals with overlapping input patterns.
Both have plugin/hook systems with naming conventions. CLI-Anything's HARNESS.md + SKILL.md format shares philosophy with ArchiveBox's CLAUDE.md + hooks.py contract.

related_repos.discovery_context: Sibling plugin package referenced in pyproject.toml dependencies
Event bus framework that ArchiveBox integrates with for plugin execution
SingleFile archiver integrated as a Chrome-based extractor plugin
